javascript.quote: const debounce = (fn, ms) => { let t; return (...args) => { clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), ms); }; };

javascript.quote: const pick = (obj, keys) => Object.fromEntries(keys.map(k => [k, obj[k]]));

sql.quote: SELECT name, email FROM users WHERE active = 1;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total) VALUES (42, 99.99);
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: UPDATE products SET price = 19.99 WHERE id = 7;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: DELETE FROM sessions WHERE expires_at < NOW();
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM users;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS orders FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE created_at >= '2024-01-01' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS sold FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id HAVING sold > 50;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN last_login TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT id, name, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM players;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id IN (SELECT id FROM departments WHERE region = 'EU');
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: BEGIN; UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 100 WHERE id = 1; UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + 100 WHERE id = 2; COMMIT;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT COALESCE(nickname, first_name, 'Anonymous') AS display_name FROM users;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: CREATE TABLE tags (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month, COUNT(*) FROM signups GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT a.name AS parent, b.name AS child FROM categories a JOIN categories b ON b.parent_id = a.id;
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: WITH top_users AS (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM top_users);
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: UPDATE users SET status = 'inactive' WHERE last_login < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days';
sql.author: sql

sql.quote: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE stock > 0 ORDER BY category ASC;
sql.author: sql
